full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #50 (2026-06-02)

PULSE
Health: 0.5215 (C). 1033 wallets, 292 contributors. 28 memos today vs 104 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
74 reward payments, 356299 PFT distributed to 18 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (75003 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,500 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (27,800 PFT, avg 3,971/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (62 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (17.0 memos/day in 2 days). 24 new wallet(s) this week. 59 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.0%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-03): 147 transactions from 25 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
